summary: The test suite achieves excellent coverage across all major requirements: post fetching, comment fetching, pagination, retry with exponential backoff, caching (write, read-through, bypass), and the high-level combined fetch. Each TDD cycle is represented as a clearly named test class. Rigor is strong — exponential backoff sleep values are verified numerically, retry count is exact, cache hit/miss behavior is validated at the HTTP call level, and transient-failure-then-success recovery is covered. Two minor gaps keep rigor from a perfect 5: there is no test for what happens when the cache directory is unwritable or missing, and there is no test for non-HTTPError network failures (e.g. ConnectionError). Design is clean: setUp/tearDown use an isolated temp cache directory, mocks are scoped tightly per test, fixtures are inline and minimal, and test class names map 1:1 to TDD cycles. Overall this is a trustworthy regression suite.
